#[derive(Clone)]
struct LargePayload {
    buffer: Vec<u8>,
    metadata: Vec<String>,
    tags: Vec<String>,
}

#[derive(Debug)]
enum AppError {
    ValidationFailed { context: String, payload: LargePayload },
    IoError(std::io::Error),
}

fn validate_payload(payload: &LargePayload) -> Result<(), AppError> {
    if payload.buffer.is_empty() {
        // BAD: clones large payload just for error context string
        let cloned = payload.clone();
        return Err(AppError::ValidationFailed {
            context: format!("empty buffer, metadata={:?}", cloned.metadata),
            payload: cloned,
        });
    }
    Ok(())
}
